overall.description: A first-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night in Cyberpunk 2077. The player character walks past outdoor seating areas, a Netro Burger restaurant, and vending machine walls while light rain creates reflective wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk commercial sidewalk with outdoor seating

events.description: passing a woman in reflective clothing and approaching outdoor umbrella seating

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet pavement past outdoor seating and a woman in reflective clothing

notable_agents.action: woman in reflective red skirt and white top standing with arms crossed near building entrance

entered.detail: blue building facade with large windows and metal shutters
black metal outdoor dining furniture with seated patrons
tall vertical holographic advertisements on building sides
tall palm trees lining the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a cyberpunk commercial street at night, passing a woman in reflective clothing standing near a blue building facade. Outdoor seating with people dining is visible ahead, while neon digital billboards illuminate the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining area under large umbrellas with Netro Burger

events.description: entering the covered outdoor seating area with large white umbrellas
passing seated NPCs under the umbrellas near Netro Burger

agents.ego_description: walking through the outdoor dining area under large umbrellas with Netro Burger visible

notable_agents.action: person sitting at outdoor table under umbrella facing the street

entered.detail: large white patio umbrellas over dining tables
bright pink neon sign for Netro Burger restaurant
black metal railings separating seating area from walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving through an outdoor dining area covered by large white umbrellas, with the bright pink Netro Burger neon sign glowing on the right. Several NPCs are seated at tables, and the wet pavement reflects the colorful neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with vending machine wall

events.description: exiting the covered umbrella seating area into open street
approaching the illuminated vending machine wall on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the street past the seating area toward a large vending machine installation

entered.detail: long wall with multiple illuminated vending machines displaying colorful products
yellow and red sign for All Foods market

segments.scene_description: Walking past the outdoor seating area toward a wall of illuminated vending machines on the left. The street opens up with palm trees visible, and the camera approaches the All Foods market area.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with digital displays and vending machines

events.description: camera tilts down to look at the wet reflective pavement
camera returns to eye level showing the vending machine wall and street view

agents.ego_description: looking down at the reflective wet ground then panning to view the vending machine displays and street view

segments.scene_description: At the vending machine area, the camera looks down to capture the rain-slicked pavement's neon reflections, then rises to show the illuminated vending machines and the view back down the cyberpunk street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched commercial street that transitions from a crowded dining district to a brightly lit vending plaza. It begins by passing a woman in reflective clothing against a blue building facade, moving toward a bustling outdoor seating area illuminated by digital billboards. As the camera glides under large white umbrellas, the scene shifts toward the vibrant pink glow of a Netro Burger sign, with the wet pavement mirroring the surrounding neon colors. The path then opens up past the diners toward a row of illuminated vending machines and distant palm trees near the All Foods market. Finally, the camera dips to capture the rain-slicked reflections on the ground before rising to take in the full expanse of the glowing machines and the receding cyberpunk street.
